title: luwz #3868
definition:
1) to depart, turn aside
    1a) (Qal) to depart
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to go wrong, go crooked
        1b2) devious, perverse (participle)
    1c) (Hiphil)
        1c1) to be lost from view
        1c2) to become devious
nasbUsage:

    NASB:  to turn aside, depart
